# CWE-412: lock path is fixed server-side, not client-controlled.
lang: go
file: CWE-412-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

const jobLockPath = "/var/run/slopguard/job.lock"

var gate sync.Mutex

func AcquireJobLock(c *gin.Context) error {
	_ = c
	data, err := os.ReadFile(jobLockPath)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	if string(data) != "free" {
		return err
	}
	gate.Lock()
	return os.WriteFile(jobLockPath, []byte("held"), 0o600)
}
